review: I was at this café on Friday, ordered a 300 ml tea with milk, and the guy at the counter charged 1600 tenge even though the tea costs 1100 — 500 straight into his pocket.
I ordered a white mocha frappuccino, paid for it, but they made the wrong one. Turns out the barista herself decided to add chocolate chips.
The coffee is terrible, they always have trainees working, so it tastes bad.
